title: DWD-076 Post Personal Shooting Kimo Otaku Revenge Video Souretsu Riruka Hen DVD Version
description: With the birth of SNS, the outflow of hidden footage and the successive exposure of former entertainers made everyone aware of the entertainer's pillow business. The entertainment agency, which was initially in trouble, is now addicted to the fact that it has become an opportunity to take advantage of it and openly press pillows for unsold talents. This work is a video of one underground idol who got on it, devoting himself to the Kimomen pig man. However, he is the only one who thinks this is his last chance to open his dream. Everything was a lie that the office set up to mediate to customs. One day, a person who cannot make any talent or effort can suddenly become a popular entertainer. Everyone knows that such a story is an eyebrow. There are no exceptions to even deceived women. Then, the reason why I got into it is probably because I was more aware of my current incompetence than anyone else. I knew that if it wasn't for such an Ultra C, I wouldn't be able to turn it over. That's why I talked about it. 1% chance. The rest is as usual. This woman didn't mean to do that either, she just made a noise about being deceived. Hopefully I believed. If it didn't work, I was deceived. She will throw away her responsibility, which she decides to believe, and will be similarly terrified after being trained by Fat. I'm glad I believed it, and I was deceived and saw a fool. No one but you decides which way to go, so take responsibility. [* The image and sound may be distorted, but please note that this is not a defect of the product itself.]
